title: Clojure: Arity Overloading
content:
Coming back to [Clojure](//clojure.org) again. It's been so long, let's start from the beginning. 
;; Arity Overloading
(defn sum
  "Add two numbers or a list of numbers and return result."
  ;; add two numbers
  ([a b]
    (+ a b))
  ;; add list of numbers
  ([x]
    (reduce + x)))

(sum 1 2)                                                   ;=> 3
(sum (range 10))                                            ;=> 45
--addition-- Give [Carbon](https://carbon.now.sh/) a try. Cool. ### Sidenote I just realized that with [IntelliJ](//www.jetbrains.com/idea/download) and [Cursive IDE](//cursive-ide.com), there's no need to install additional JDK and Leiningen in order to write Clojure. That's good.
